name: What evidence do I need if Google AI Overview gave wrong medical info about my Houston clinic?
description: Screenshots, loss metrics, expert links to harm.

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need if Google AI Overview gave wrong medical info about my Houston clinic?

acceptedAnswer.text: Screenshots, loss metrics, expert links to harm.
acceptedAnswer.description: Screenshots of AI output, traffic/revenue drop data, patient complaints, expert testimony on harm.[1][2] Key factors: Direct link to losses; falsity proof; no immunity exception. Preserve all digital records now. TX business tort lawyers can assess.
